description: The CurrentDateTimeTextDriver component takes the current time and formats it using C# DateTime to string using format as an argument.

fields.Target: What to drive the contents to be the current time formatted.
fields.Pattern: The pattern to use when rendering the date time, EX: 24 vs 12 hr.
fields.UseUTC: Whether the current time outputted should be UTC time zone.
fields.OverrideFormat: How to format the outputted current time.

usage: See the .NET Standard date and time format strings for DateTimePattern values:
